The residence

Isla

A third-floor one-bedroom residence in the stone village heart of Green Coast, Palasë. Set above the central plaza where the Riviera hillside meets the sea air, the apartment pairs a calm, well-proportioned interior with the resort's promenades, pools and the Blue Flag beach below — a complete coastal address in Albania's most established seaside resort.

Location within the resort

Location & setting

Life at Green Coast

Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.

South-eastern edge, the last building before the greenery
Set apart on the quiet village boundary
Private parking bay · 12.5 m²
Stone-built village · travertine & timber
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
← The Collection

Position within Green Coast

Where Isla sits

Isla holds the south-eastern edge of the village — the last building before the greenery, set apart from the centre with the quiet of the boundary. The central plaza is a short walk north-west, the parking entrance beyond it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
